# Tepna

> A fleet of local-only, single-signal physiological analyzers. Read one raw biosignal from a wearable you own — oxygen, heartbeat, pulse, glucose — derive evidence-graded metrics, and fuse across signals. 100% in your browser: no upload, no account.

Repository: https://github.com/Plantucha/Tepna · License: Apache-2.0 · Author: Michal Planicka

## Reference guides (per node)
- [OxyDex](https://tepna.net/OxyDex%20Reference.html): SpO₂ / oximetry — Overnight blood oxygen — ODI-4, T90, hypoxic burden.
- [PpgDex](https://tepna.net/PpgDex%20Reference.html): Wrist PPG — Optical pulse → PPI → HRV + pulse-wave morphology.
- [PulseDex](https://tepna.net/PulseDex%20Reference.html): HRV from raw RR — RR-interval streams → time / frequency HRV.
- [ECGDex](https://tepna.net/ECGDex%20Reference.html): Raw ECG — ~130 Hz ECG → QRS, QTc, HRV.
- [HRVDex](https://tepna.net/HRVDex%20Reference.html): HRV summaries — Additive multi-day HRV ledger.
- [GlucoDex](https://tepna.net/GlucoDex%20Reference.html): CGM — Continuous glucose → Time in Range, GMI.
- [CPAPDex](https://tepna.net/CPAPDex%20Reference.html): CPAP therapy — EDF therapy data → pressure, leak, respiratory events.

## Overview
- [Science](https://tepna.net/Science.html)
- [Architecture](https://tepna.net/Architecture.html)
- [How to Collect Data](https://tepna.net/How%20to%20Collect%20Data.html)
- [About](https://tepna.net/Why%20This%20Exists.html)
- [Papers](https://tepna.net/papers/papers.html)

## Authoritative context (source repository)
- [README](https://github.com/Plantucha/Tepna/blob/main/README.md): Front door — what the suite measures well, the evidence ladder, the roster.
- [ORIENTATION](https://github.com/Plantucha/Tepna/blob/main/ORIENTATION.md): The 60-second map: roster, shared spine, the two gates.
- [Architecture principles](https://github.com/Plantucha/Tepna/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE-PRINCIPLES.md): Three layers, downhill deps, contracts-as-product, the epistemic/fusion principles.
- [Lexicon](https://github.com/Plantucha/Tepna/blob/main/docs/LEXICON.md): Canonical terminology (Ganglior, Integrator, node, tier).
- [Why this exists](https://github.com/Plantucha/Tepna/blob/main/docs/WHY-THIS-EXISTS.md): The philosophy and constraints (narrative, not spec).

Full concatenated context: https://tepna.net/llms-full.txt
